query:
-- First, create the admin role if it doesn't exist
INSERT IGNORE INTO staff_roles (name, description, permissions, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES ('admin', 'Administrator with full access', '["read","write","delete","manage_staff"]', NOW(), NOW());

-- Get the admin role ID
SET @roleId = (SELECT id FROM staff_roles WHERE name = 'admin' LIMIT 1);

-- Get Ahmed's user ID
SET @userId = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = 'ah.fuadh@gmail.com' LIMIT 1);

-- Create or update Ahmed's staff record
INSERT INTO staff (userId, roleId, department, position, isActive, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES (@userId, @roleId, 'Management', 'Administrator', 1, NOW(), NOW())
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE 
  roleId = @roleId,
  department = 'Management',
  position = 'Administrator',
  isActive = 1,
  updatedAt = NOW();

-- Verify the staff record
SELECT s.id, u.name, u.email, sr.name as role, s.department, s.position, s.isActive
FROM staff s
JOIN users u ON s.userId = u.id
JOIN staff_roles sr ON s.roleId = sr.id
WHERE u.email = 'ah.fuadh@gmail.com';
